betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§fThe §6Wireless Terminal §fprovides portable access to the ME network within range of a §6Wireless Access Point§f.

§fRight-click to open the terminal interface. The terminal draws power from its internal buffer, which recharges when placed in a §6Charger§f.

§fRange depends on the number of §6Wireless Boosters §fconnected to the Access Point. Each booster extends range by §e16 blocks§f.

§fCraft with:
§b1× ME Terminal + 1× Wireless Receiver + 1× Logic Processor + 1× Fluix Pearl
